preconditions: S3 and SMTP configured; logged in as college_admin/open audit reports page
steps: Set date range to last 30 days; enter email; click Export CSV & email link
expected_result: Success toast shown; export row created with processing then completed; s3_key present; email received with download link

preconditions: Logged in as college_admin or super_admin
steps: Set from/to; set action UPDATE_ADMIN_SETTINGS; click Refresh logs
expected_result: Only matching rows shown; no crash on empty result

steps: Clear email field; click Export CSV & email link
expected_result: Validation warning or API error shown; export not started
Latest status visible and table updates correctly

preconditions: Employer login; at least one drive application exists
steps: Open Assessment uploads (CSV); Drive tab; Export CSV
expected_result: CSV downloads with required headers; includes all drive applications for tenant

preconditions: Employer approved for tenant; job exists; CSV with job_id per row
steps: Jobs tab; upload edited export CSV
expected_result: Upload succeeds; accepted/rejected counts shown; appears in history

preconditions: CSV includes roll numbers not present in tenant student_profiles
expected_result: Rows not in master list rejected with clear errors; no outside student inserted
Validation blocks upload with clear message
Upload rejected with missing header error

preconditions: CSV has duplicate college_roll_no rows for same target
expected_result: Duplicate rows rejected with row-level error message

preconditions: CSV has remarks > 4000 chars for one or more rows
expected_result: Rows violating limit rejected; other valid rows processed

preconditions: Employer login; applications on Internship tab
steps: Open Assessment Update Online; edit round cell; Save
expected_result: Row persists; visible on Hiring Results Dashboard and college Hiring Assessment

preconditions: Internship job with applications; round labels set in Assessment map
steps: Internship tab; export; edit round columns; CSV upload
expected_result: Upload succeeds for internship applications (not blocked)

steps: Export CSV; change one round value; re-upload; re-export
expected_result: Changed round value in CSV and on Hiring Results Dashboard

preconditions: At least one export run completed
steps: Run SQL: SELECT id,status,s3_key,emailed_to,created_at FROM audit_report_exports ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 10
expected_result: Record exists with expected status and metadata

preconditions: At least one assessment upload completed
steps: Run SQL: SELECT id,drive_id,job_id,total_rows,accepted_rows,rejected_rows,created_at FROM employer_assessment_uploads ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 10
expected_result: Batch row exists with correct counts

preconditions: At least one upload with unregistered-in-drive students
steps: Run SQL: SELECT upload_id,roll_number,is_unregistered_student,remarks FROM employer_assessment_rows ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 50
expected_result: Rows present with correct is_unregistered_student flags

steps: Run SQL: SELECT upload_id,round_no,round_label FROM employer_assessment_rounds ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 25
expected_result: Five rounds stored per upload with expected labels from Assessment map
